content:
It's simply an indicator as to how in alignment you are, right?

If you don't feel good, then you're you're closed off pin shot, like, right, theve is turned off from source from that well-being.

And so that's when the anxiety, right anxiety is subtle, depression is heavier.

And then if you don't listen to it to mentally, those loops are those patterns, right, then it's going to come.

And turn physical.

And so then, and get louder and louder until you have to listen.

But there's no source of sickness.

There's only a resistance or restriction of this source of well-being.
